description: pgvector similarity search against a Supabase table with a vector column.

inputs.description: Upstream DataFrame with a query-vector column (optional)

outputs.description: Matched rows with rank + query context

resource_name.label: Resource Name
resource_name.description: Resource key of the SupabaseResource providing the client.

table_name.label: Table Name
table_name.description: Supabase table containing the vector column.

embedding_column.label: Embedding Column
embedding_column.description: Vector column (pgvector type) on the target table.

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream DataFrame asset providing query vectors (one search per row).

query_embedding_column.label: Query Embedding Column
query_embedding_column.description: Column on upstream DataFrame holding the query vector.

query_vector.label: Query Vector
query_vector.description: Static query vector (list[float]). Alternative to upstream/query_embedding_column.

top_k.label: Top K
top_k.description: Number of nearest neighbors to return per query.

additional_columns.label: Additional Columns
additional_columns.description: Extra columns to return alongside the match (defaults to all).

rpc_name.label: RPC Name
rpc_name.description: Postgres function callable via client.rpc(...) that runs the pgvector search.

match_threshold.label: Match Threshold
match_threshold.description: Optional similarity threshold forwarded to the RPC.

name: Supabase Vector Search
